info.title: Compass labels around plot with three.js Text labels

parts.text:
Update src/three/PlotViewer.jsx.

Add compass labels N, S, E, W around the plot using Text from @react-three/drei.
Position them near edges.
Keep implementation simple.
The user wants me to add compass labels (N, S, E, W) around a plot in a Three.js component. Let me first read the file to understand its structure.

state.output:
<path>/home/tejasree/Rk-Estates/frontend/src/three/PlotViewer.jsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import { Canvas } from '@react-three/fiber';
2: import { Box, Edges } from '@react-three/drei';
3: 
4: function PlotBox({ length, width, status }) {
5:   const getColor = () => {
6:     if (status === 'available') return '#22c55e';
7:     if (status === 'reserved') return '#eab308';
8:     return '#ef4444';
9:   };
10: 
11:   return (
12:     <mesh castShadow receiveShadow>
13:       <boxGeometry args={[length, 1, width]} />
14:       <meshStandardMaterial color={getColor()} />
15:       <Edges color="black" threshold={15} />
16:     </mesh>
17:   );
18: }
19: 
20: export default function PlotViewer({ length = 10, width = 10, status = 'available' }) {
21:   return (
22:     <Canvas shadows camera={{ position: [15, 15, 15], fov: 50 }}>
23:       <ambientLight intensity={0.4} />
24:       <directionalLight
25:         position={[10, 20, 10]}
26:         intensity={1}
27:         castShadow
28:         shadow-mapSize={[2048, 2048]}
29:       />
30:       <PlotBox length={length} width={width} status={status} />
31:       <gridHelper args={[30, 30]} />
32:     </Canvas>
33:   );
34: }

(End of file - total 34 lines)
</content>
state.title: frontend/src/three/PlotViewer.jsx

parts.text:
Now I need to add compass labels N, S, E, W around the plot. I'll import Text from @react-three/drei and add four Text components positioned at the edges of the plot. Let me calculate positions based on the default length and width of 10.

The plot has length (x-axis) and width (z-axis). I'll position the labels:
- N (North): at z = -width/2 - offset
- S (South): at z = width/2 + offset
- E (East): at x = length/2 + offset
- W (West): at x = -length/2 - offset

I'll make them simple and keep the implementation straightforward.

Done. I've added compass labels N, S, E, W around the plot using Text from @react-three/drei. The labels are positioned slightly outside the edges of the plot (at offset of 1 unit) and rotated to lie flat on the ground plane.

parts.text:
Now I need to add the compass labels around the plot. I'll use Text from @react-three/drei and position them near the edges of the plot. Let me calculate the positions based on the plot dimensions.

The plot has:
- length (x-axis)
- width (z-axis)

I'll position:
- N (North): at negative z (front)
- S (South): at positive z (back) 
- E (East): at positive x (right)
- W (West): at negative x (left)

I'll place them slightly outside the plot boundaries.

input.newString:
<PlotBox length={length} width={width} status={status} />
      <gridHelper args={[30, 30]} />
      <Text position={[0, 0.1, -width / 2 - 1]} fontSize={0.8} rotation={[-Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]}>
        N
      </Text>
      <Text position={[0, 0.1, width / 2 + 1]} fontSize={0.8} rotation={[-Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]}>
        S
      </Text>
      <Text position={[length / 2 + 1, 0.1, 0]} fontSize={0.8} rotation={[-Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]}>
        E
      </Text>
      <Text position={[-length / 2 - 1, 0.1, 0]} fontSize={0.8} rotation={[-Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]}>
        W
      </Text>
    </Canvas>

parts.text:
Done. I've added compass labels N, S, E, W using Text from @react-three/drei. The labels are positioned around the plot:
- N at the north edge (negative z)
- S at the south edge (positive z)
- E at the east edge (positive x)
- W at the west edge (negative x)

Each is positioned 1 unit outside the plot boundaries with fontSize 0.8 and rotated to lie flat on the ground plane.
Done. Added compass labels N, S, E, W using `Text` from `@react-three/drei`, positioned 1 unit outside each edge of the plot.
